title: Move constants and extensions from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets
description: The pew_pew_plaza app contains constants (TDurations), extensions (color_extension, text_style_extension), and a context extension that all showcase widgets depend on. This task moves those files into turbo_widgets so the widget files can import them.
context:
In pew_pew_plaza:
- `lib/core/ui/constants/t_durations.dart` — static Duration constants for animations, hover, throttle, etc.
- `lib/core/ui/widgets/color_extension.dart` — MASSIVE file (~42KB) with Color extensions: .onHover, .darken, .lighten, .onColor, .asSoftText, badge helpers, MeshGradientPoint extensions, Color.toHex, .alphaBlendOn, etc. Also depends on `mesh_gradient` package.
- `lib/core/ui/widgets/text_style_extension.dart` — TextStyle extensions: .bold, .withColor, .copyWithCurrent (uses UpdateCurrentDef<T>). Also AutoSizeText and Text .merge extensions. Depends on `auto_size_text` package.
- `lib/core/state/extensions/context_extension.dart` — BuildContext extensions providing context.colors, context.texts, context.tools, context.sizes, context.decorations, context.data, context.themeMode, context.theme, context.deviceType, context.breakpointConfig, context.media, context.overlayState, context.maxWidth, context.maxHeight, etc. ALSO has pew_pew_plaza-specific things: context.strings (l10n), GoRouter extensions, StatefulNavigationShell access.

turbo_widgets already has:
- `lib/src/extensions/t_completer_extension.dart`
- `lib/src/utils/t_min_duration_completer.dart`

The context extension needs to be SPLIT: theme-access parts move to turbo_widgets, app-specific parts (l10n, GoRouter) stay in pew_pew_plaza.
instructions: Read the dev-conventions skill files before starting: `~/.claude/skills/dev-conventions/conventions/extensions.md`, `~/.claude/skills/dev-conventions/conventions/constants.md`
Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read ALL source files listed in the context section from pew_pew_plaza.
Read the existing turbo_widgets extensions and utils to avoid conflicts.
Create `lib/src/constants/t_durations.dart` — straight copy of TDurations class with all static const Duration fields.

Create `lib/src/extensions/t_color_extension.dart` — copy of color_extension.dart with import fixes. Replace `package:pew_pew_plaza/...` imports with turbo_widgets paths. This file depends on mesh_gradient package (pubspec handled by task 9).

Create `lib/src/extensions/t_text_style_extension.dart` — copy of text_style_extension.dart. Replace UpdateCurrentDef import with turbo_widgets typedef path. Replace auto_size_text import (keep as-is, pubspec handled by task 9).

Create `lib/src/extensions/t_context_extension.dart` — a NEW file containing ONLY the theme-related BuildContext extensions from context_extension.dart. Include: context.turboProvider, context.colors, context.texts, context.tools, context.sizes, context.decorations, context.data, context.themeMode, context.theme (using ShadCN), context.deviceType, context.breakpointConfig, context.media, context.maxWidth, context.maxHeight, context.overlayState, context.renderBox, context.hasKeyboard, context.unfocus. DO NOT include: context.strings (l10n), GoRouter extensions, StatefulNavigationShell access, ContextExtension methods that depend on go_router. Import TProvider and other turbo_widgets types.
All files must use `package:turbo_widgets/src/...` paths — never reference pew_pew_plaza.
Do NOT add exports to the barrel file — task 9 handles that.
Do NOT modify pew_pew_plaza files — task 10 handles that.
acceptance_criteria: TDurations class exists at lib/src/constants/t_durations.dart with all original static fields
Color extension exists at lib/src/extensions/t_color_extension.dart with all original extensions
TextStyle extension exists at lib/src/extensions/t_text_style_extension.dart with all original extensions
Context extension exists at lib/src/extensions/t_context_extension.dart with ONLY theme-related extensions (no l10n, no GoRouter)
No file imports anything from pew_pew_plaza
Cross-references between these files and theme files (task 1) use package:turbo_widgets/src/ paths
constraints: Do NOT include GoRouter, l10n (Strings), or StatefulNavigationShell in the context extension — those stay in pew_pew_plaza
Do NOT add exports to turbo_widgets.dart — task 9 does that
Do NOT modify pew_pew_plaza — task 10 does that
Do NOT add package dependencies to pubspec.yaml — task 9 does that
Preserve ALL extension methods and their signatures exactly
goals: Constants and extensions exist in turbo_widgets as standalone files
Widget files created in later tasks can import TDurations, color extensions, and context.colors/context.sizes/etc.
non_goals: Splitting the color extension into smaller files
handoff_from_task_1: Task 1 created t_colors.dart and t_texts.dart that import t_color_extension.dart and t_text_style_extension.dart from the paths this task will create. TColors constructor now takes TTheme as a third required parameter (in addition to context and themeMode). The t_context_extension.dart you create should import TProvider from package:turbo_widgets/src/theme/t_provider.dart. context.theme getter in the original context_extension creates a TTheme — import TTheme from package:turbo_widgets/src/theme/t_theme.dart and TLazyLocatorDef from package:turbo_widgets/src/typedefs/t_lazy_locator_def.dart if needed (though the getter can use inline T Function() since that's what TTheme's constructor accepts). The TUpdateCurrentDef typedef lives at package:turbo_widgets/src/typedefs/t_update_current_def.dart for the text_style_extension's copyWithCurrent.
worklog: Created 4 files. (1) lib/src/constants/t_durations.dart - straight copy with all 25 static const Duration fields. (2) lib/src/extensions/t_color_extension.dart - full 1227-line copy with 5 extensions (BadgeColorExtensions, MeshGradientPointListExtension, ColorExtension, ColorListExtension, GradientExtension). No pew_pew imports in original. (3) lib/src/extensions/t_text_style_extension.dart - 3 extensions. UpdateCurrentDef renamed to TUpdateCurrentDef with turbo_widgets import. auto_size_text import kept as-is. (4) lib/src/extensions/t_context_extension.dart - NEW file named TContextExtension (avoids collision with pew_pew_plaza ContextExtension). 18 public members + 5 private theme helpers. Excluded: strings, shell, tryPop, popNavigator, navigation, navigator, overlay, vsync, textScaler, extendRatio, themeData. Zero pew_pew_plaza imports verified.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Add any corrections, discovered dependencies, or context that would help tasks 3-8 succeed.
